chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 108 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.10331/2023 (Urgency). 2. For orders on CMA No.10332/2023 (Withdrawal). 18.07.2023 Syed Zaeem Haider, Advocate for the plaintiff a/w Plaintiff Muhammad Mujeebullah Siddiqui (CNIC No.42101-3282603-9). Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Advocate for SBCA. Sardar Ali Sher Khan, AAG............. 1. Granted. 2. Counsel for the Plaintiff has moved this application for withdrawal of the suit. The Plaintiff is present in person. Plaintiff’s request is acceded. The suit stands dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to cost. J U D G E
